channel.title: Homes on Homepage (Xing Xu)
channel.description: Recent content in Homes on Homepage (Xing Xu)

item.description: Biography Xing Xu is a lecturer with Center of Future Media & School of Computer Science and Engineering, University of Electronic of Science and Technology of China (UESTC), China. He received the B.E. and M.E. degrees from Huazhong University of Science and Technology, China, in 2009 and 2012, respectively, and the Ph.D. degree from Kyushu University, Japan, in 2015. Before joining UESTC, he worked as a Research Technician at Kyushu University (2015-2016).

item.title: Custom Section
item.description: This is an example of using the custom widget to create your own homepage section. To remove this section, either delete content/home/teaching.md or edit the frontmatter of the file to deactivate the widget by setting active = false.
